description: ZEN by Zenterra offers a premium, 2,000 sq. ft. 4-bed/4-bath townhome designed for modern living. This turn-key residence features a gourmet kitchen with a gas cooktop, double wall ovens, a wine fridge, and a new garbage disposal. Recent 2022/2024 updates include refreshed lighting, new stair carpeting, and upgraded laminate flooring throughout the upper level and basement.The layout is highly functional, featuring a lower-level bedroom and full bath perfect for guests or teens. Parking is a standout with a double side-by-side garage, EV charger, and apron parking. Outdoor living includes a large balcony with a gas BBQ hookup. Located in a top-tier community with clubhouse amenities, it’s walking distance to schools, shopping, and the future SkyTrain extension. High-end West Coast style.
